arts.sum: Atletico saw their winning run end at 15 games at Leganes at the weekend. They face a tough task to get back to winning ways in the week. Bayer Leverkusen extended their winning streak to 11 matches ...

arts.ttl: 5 reasons why Bayer Leverkusen will beat Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League
arts.sum: Bayer Leverkusen resume their UEFA Champions League challenge with a high-profile fixture against old foes Atlético Madrid on Tuesday and bundesliga.com offers five reasons the defending Bundesliga champions will come out on top as they seek qualification for the Round of 16 in the Spanish capital. Leverkusen scored three against Gladbach at the weekend and Florian Wirtz was involved in every goal, scoring twice and assisting teammate Patrik Schick for a third.
